name: Kokoro TTS
description: Local text-to-speech engine for SENNI. Installs kokoro and soundfile via pip, and espeak-ng via the system package manager.
author: AURINI project

checks.description: Python 3 is available at the configured path
checks.note: Checked against python_path from SENNI config (or sys.executable if unset).

checks.description: espeak-ng is installed and on PATH (required by kokoro for phoneme generation)
Kokoro voices directory exists and contains at least one .pt voice file
checks.note: Path is the voices_path from SENNI config, or auto-discovered next to tts.py if unset. Checked at pre-flight time.

remedies.description: Install the kokoro package via pip into the configured Python environment.
remedies.undo_instructions:
Run: pip uninstall kokoro -y
(or use the same python_path: <python_path> -m pip uninstall kokoro -y)

remedies.description: Install the soundfile package via pip into the configured Python environment.
remedies.undo_instructions:
Run: pip uninstall soundfile -y
(or use the same python_path: <python_path> -m pip uninstall soundfile -y)

remedies.description: Install espeak-ng via the system package manager (apt on Linux, winget on Windows).
remedies.undo_instructions:
Linux:   sudo apt remove espeak-ng
Windows: winget uninstall espeak-ng

remedies.description: No Kokoro voice files (.pt) were found. Voice files must be downloaded manually from Hugging Face.
instructions: Kokoro voice files are not bundled with the kokoro pip package.
Save the .pt files into the voices directory that SENNI is configured to use.
If you haven't set a voices_path in SENNI's config, place them in a 'voices/' folder
Then run AURINI again — it will detect the files and confirm everything is ready.

settings.label: Python executable
settings.description: Path to the Python executable with kokoro installed. Leave blank to use the same Python that SENNI is running under (sys.executable). Set this if you installed kokoro in a virtual environment.

settings.label: Voices directory
settings.description: Path to the directory containing Kokoro .pt voice files. Leave blank to auto-discover from the folder next to tts.py. Set this if you store voices in a custom location.

settings.label: espeak-ng binary
settings.description: Path to the espeak-ng binary. Leave blank to rely on PATH (the default after a normal system install). Set this if espeak-ng is installed to a non-standard location.
